text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "In Emergency Department for skin redness, edema and pain in left leg.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Reports that symptoms have been present for about 2-3 days, worsened in the last 24 hours.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Reports no trauma.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Reports no insect bites.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Reports no recent prolonged immobilization, no recent surgery, nor recent long-term travel.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Reports fever yesterday.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Reports no cough/dyspnea/GI disorders/urinary disorders.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Recent Medical History On Feb 8th, admitted to the Emergency Department for fever and malaise.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "Blood Tests WBC 24530 CRP 0.69.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "Chest X-ray negative for inflammatory thickened lesions.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "Multistick urine test negative.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "Discharged home with indication for antibiotic therapy with cefixoral 400 mg/day and azithromycin 500 mg/day for 5 days.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "SARS CoV2 vaccination: 2 doses + previous SARS CoV2 infection Past Medical History - Occasional alcohol consumption - Active smoker - Varicose veins Therapy: none Drug-related allergies: none Tel PHONE_NUMBER", 0.0, 0.5)
